title: Implement fuzz testing subsystem
description: 5 fuzzers: FuzzEvaluate (seeds from golden files), FuzzEvaluateWithAllowlist (INV-A1/A2/B1), FuzzConfigParse, FuzzHookInput, FuzzHookProcess. verifyInvariants function (8 invariants). LoadFuzzSeeds from golden files + templates. Allowlist fuzzer helpers.
